subcodes.first_line: O Teacher! Success is thy companion and mighty confirmation thy aid, yet pure soil is needed for the rain of mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای استاد توفیق رفیقست و تایید شدید ولی استعداد لازم باران رحمت را خاک پاک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @development of capacity and readiness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
